candidates.title: Edit a 2-minute vertical (9:16) product video from a ready-made storyboard
candidates.brief: I need a clean, polished 2 to 2.5-minute vertical video (9:16, 1080×1920) for a software product launch — it'll go on YouTube Shorts, our website, the Chrome Web Store, and Product Hunt. This is an assembly-and-motion job, not a from-scratch creative project. I'm handing you everything, already done: A scene-by-scene storyboard (Word + PDF) where each scene clearly shows the exact image to use, the on-screen text to type, the voiceover line, and how it should move. It's laid out so you can literally go in order, scene by scene. All on-screen images as full-resolution PNGs (already designed and branded), including the title card and end card. The voiceover (I record it separately and send you the audio). Brand colors and font. Your job is to assemble it cleanly with simple motion, a music bed, and burned-in captions. Deliverables Main video — 1080×1920, 9:16, with music and burned-in capt

candidates.title: Live-Action App Feature Promo
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro · Animate — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: We are launching Spand, a premium, minimalist health-tech and biometric tracking ecosystem. We need an experienced, high-end motion graphics designer to produce a stunning, 60-second product demonstration and promotional video. The aesthetic of our brand is sleek, dark-mode, and minimalist (similar to the design language of Apple Health, Oura, or linear-style tech promotions). The video will blend our app's UI/UX screens, screen recordings of live prototypes, and smooth vector animations to tell a seamless story of automated health tracking. Creative Direction & Aesthetic Style: Clean, premium, professional, minimalist. No cluttered elements, bright cartoonish animations, or aggressive stock transitions. Color Palette: Dominated by a rich, stealth dark background (#141716) combined with crisp white typography and a signature dark slate green brand accent. Pacing: Calm, confident, fluid,

candidates.title: 360° VR Hawai'i Wedding Video Editing
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro — for video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have an entire beach & mountains wedding day captured in stitched-ready 360° footage and now need it shaped into a romantic, emotionally-driven story that guests can relive inside a headset or on a phone. The idea is to open with a concise highlight reel that flows gracefully through the day, then let viewers dive into separate, fully-edited clips for every key moment. Collaboration is important to me, I value clear communication & hope my feedback will be welcome at every stage. Here’s what I will hand over: * Raw 360° files covering a pre-ceremony women’s blessing circle, arch creation (& removal), the full ceremony, the welcoming-with-bubbles to the reception, reception highlights, & including full video of each singer and speaker. * Ambient audio tracks and the RAV pan drum music we want woven underneath … What I need back: * A polished highlight reel (6–8 min range) paced for emot

candidates.title: Explainer Video for Health Product
candidates.tools: Illustrator · After Effects · Premiere Pro — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: We are looking for a talented and experienced Motion Graphics Designer / Animator to create a high-quality animated explainer video for a health/household product (a toilet squatting stool). The video will explain the health benefits of the product using anatomy/medical animations and demonstrate how the product solves a common daily issue. Reference Style: The style, pacing, and visual storytelling should be exactly like this video: ⁠[https://youtu.be/7cENAvhK19Y](https://youtu.be/7cENAvhK19Y)⁠. We require clean vector animations, smooth transitions, and clear 2D/3D anatomical and product illustrations. What We Will Provide: Complete Voiceover (VO) audio track. Finalized Script / Storyboard concept. Product branding details and logo. What You Will Deliver: Full Animation Production: Character/Object design, scene layout, and motion graphics based on the script. Anatomical/Technical Anim

candidates.title: AI-Generated 1920s Immigrant Film
candidates.tools: After Effects · Animate — for layered/retouched assets and video/motion editing
candidates.brief: I have a completed screenplay that follows a group of Mexican immigrants making their way through the American Southwest around 1920, and I want to see it come to life entirely through AI-powered video production. Rather than traditional filming or partial VFX work, the goal is to generate the whole movie with artificial-intelligence tools—characters, performances, voices, and scenery included. Scope of work • Turn the existing script pages into a fully rendered animated feature (or stylised live-action look, if achievable) produced end-to-end with AI. • Generate believable characters and period-accurate costumes, animate their performances, and stage every scene in historically authentic 1920 backdrops—border towns, rail yards, desert crossings, and early-industrial cities. • Create natural-sounding multilingual voiceovers (Spanish and English) that match each character’s personality an
